title: M88X's Tools
description: Better Tools. This texture pack changes the tools and simplifies them
body:
Better tools. this is the trial version of a texture pack that makes the tools like the pictures
![Diamond Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cdc76e439a3077ff8b77f6491e67f39b920556c.png) 
![Iron Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01b6d19e44a05335cd4b96ca84e93f5afbeff8bc.png)
this texture pack does not need optifine.
this texture pack is compatible with all versions from 1.21.5 to 1.15
